headline: CrowdStrike Award Underscores AI Security Role And Stretches Rich Valuation
summary: CrowdStrike Holdings (NasdaqGS:CRWD) has been named Frost & Sullivan's 2026 Growth and Innovation Leader in Cloud and Application Runtime Security. This is the second consecutive year the company has received this recognition. The award highlights CrowdStrike's role in AI native security infrastructure and the traction of its Falcon platform in securing AI workloads. CrowdStrike's latest recognition lands at a time when the stock has had a strong multi year run and remains in focus with a...

headline: Can CRWD Stock Deliver If The AI Boom Stalls?
summary: After a 40% run over the last 12 months, the conversation around CrowdStrike (CRWD) stock is almost entirely about artificial intelligence. You hear about the Mythos inflection point and a new generation of products designed to secure AI deployments. But with that excitement comes a fair question from skeptics: Is this a durable trend, or just a surge of interest and intent from companies still in the early innings of actual AI deployment.

headline: Is CrowdStrike Holdings, Inc. (CRWD) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is CRWD a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on CrowdStrike Holdings, Inc. on Nikhs’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on CRWD. CrowdStrike Holdings, Inc.’s share was trading at $647.74 as of June 10th. CRWD’s trailing and forward P/E were 401.83 and 131.58 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. […]

headline: CrowdStrike Named the Frost Radar™ Leader in Cloud and Application Runtime Security for Second Consecutive Time
summary: AUSTIN, Texas, June 11, 2026--CrowdStrike (NASDAQ: CRWD) today announced it has been named the Growth and Innovation Leader in the 2026 Frost Radar™: Cloud and Application Runtime Security for the second consecutive time, scoring highest of all vendors evaluated. As AI workloads and frontier model risk expose the limits of posture-only defense, organizations are turning to runtime-first security on the CrowdStrike Falcon® platform to stop breaches in real time.

raw.headline: CrowdStrike Named the Frost Radar™ Leader in Cloud and Application Runtime Security for Second Consecutive Time
raw.summary: AUSTIN, Texas, June 11, 2026--CrowdStrike (NASDAQ: CRWD) today announced it has been named the Growth and Innovation Leader in the 2026 Frost Radar™: Cloud and Application Runtime Security for the second consecutive time, scoring highest of all vendors evaluated. As AI workloads and frontier model risk expose the limits of posture-only defense, organizations are turning to runtime-first security on the CrowdStrike Falcon® platform to stop breaches in real time.
